messages.text: Hi, I just moved to Bandra. Looking for a serious gym for muscle gain.
Welcome to the neighbourhood! We have a fully-equipped strength floor, 4 certified coaches and an annual premium plan with unlimited PT. What's your training experience?
I've been lifting for 3 years. Can I start this week?
Absolutely. I can book a free posture assessment today at 7:30 PM. Shall I lock that slot?
Yes, please.
Hello, do you have personal trainers who specialise in weight loss for women?
Yes — we have 2 female-certified trainers (NSCA & ACE) and a nutritionist on staff. Could you share your goal weight and timeline?
I want to lose 8 kg in 4 months.
Very realistic. A 12-week PT + diet plan is ₹18,500. I can also schedule a free consultation with Coach Meera tomorrow at 8 AM.
What are your monthly membership fees?
Our monthly membership is ₹3,499 including access to all equipment, group classes and locker.
Hmm, I'll think about it.
No pressure at all. I'll save your details and check in next week. Is WhatsApp okay?
Yeah, WhatsApp is fine.
Do you have morning yoga batches?
Yes — Vinyasa at 6:30 AM, Hatha at 7:30 AM and a beginner-friendly session at 8:15 AM, Mon–Sat.
Perfect, I'll try the 7:30 one.
Great choice. First trial class is free — should I register you for tomorrow?
I need a corporate plan for 15 employees. What's the pricing?
We offer 20% off on annual plans for 10+ members, plus dedicated trainer slots and health-check tie-ups. I'll email a custom proposal by evening.
Send it to vikram.singh@mycompany.in, please.
Noted. I'll also call you tomorrow around 2:30 PM to walk you through it. Good time?
Works for me.
I had a baby 6 months back. Do you have post-pregnancy programmes?
Yes — our 'Return to Strength' programme covers pelvic floor rehab, core rebuilding and nutrition. I recommend Coach Sneha, she's specialised in this.
Can you call me next week? I'm busy with the baby right now.
Of course. I'll call you next Tuesday between 9–11 AM. Congratulations on your little one! 🍼
I want a serious muscle-gain plan. What PT packages do you have?
We have 12-session (₹12,000), 24-session (₹22,000) and 48-session (₹40,000) bundles, all with custom diet charts.
24 sessions sounds good. Do you have evening slots after 8?
Yes — 8 PM, 8:45 PM and 9:30 PM are available on Mon/Wed/Fri. Which works?
8:45 PM Mon/Wed/Fri, booked.
How much does a diet consultation cost?
A single session with our in-house nutritionist is ₹800, including a 30-day meal plan. A 3-month package is ₹2,200.
I'm busy now, will check later.
Sure — I'll send you the plan on WhatsApp. Feel free to ping back anytime!
Do you have any yoga or meditation classes?
We have 6 yoga formats weekly plus a Sunday guided meditation. Would you like a free trial?
Maybe later, I'm travelling this week.
Noted. I'll follow up when you're back. Safe travels! ✈️
Is there a student discount?
Yes — 25% off on monthly plans with a valid college ID. That brings it down to ₹2,624/month.
Okay cool, can I take a trial first?
Absolutely. Drop in anytime between 5–7 PM with your ID and we'll give you a free day pass.
My doctor said I need to control my cholesterol. Can your trainers help?
Yes — we design cardio-heavy, medically-aware programmes. We also tie up with nearby labs for quarterly lipid tests.
How much does the quarterly plan cost?
₹14,000 for 3 months, includes unlimited cardio zone access and 2 PT sessions/week.
I work long hours sitting. Looking for posture correction classes.
We run 'Desk Reset' sessions on Tue & Thu at 7 PM — mix of Pilates and mobility work. Want to try one?
Yes, please register me for Thursday.
Done. See you Thursday at 7 PM, wear comfortable clothes!
I want to bulk up in 6 months. Can your gym get me there?
100%. Our coaches have prepped 40+ clients for amateur bodybuilding. I'd start you on a 12-week PT plan + diet.
What's the total cost?
Annual plan + 48 PT sessions comes to ₹62,000 — best value for serious bulking goals.
Let me discuss with my wife and get back.
Of course. I'll follow up on Saturday evening. Take your time!
Do you have women-only batches?
Yes — we have a women-only floor open 6 AM–12 PM and a dedicated women's batch at 5 PM.
Great, I'll visit this weekend.
Lovely! Saturday at 11 AM is great for a guided tour. I'll reserve a slot.
Looking for an early-morning HIIT batch. Anything before 6:30?
We have a 5:30 AM HIIT class Mon–Fri with Coach Arjun, very popular with finance folks.
Sold. How do I join?
I'll send you a sign-up link. Annual premium is ₹65,000 with early-bird discount until Friday.
Hi, just enquiring about timings.
We're open 5 AM–11 PM on weekdays, 6 AM–10 PM on weekends.
Ok thanks.
Anytime! Ping me if you want a quick tour.
I'm diabetic type-2. Can trainers here handle it safely?
Yes — our trainers are trained in exercise prescription for diabetes. We'll also coordinate with your doctor if you share reports.
That's reassuring. I'll join next month after my check-up.
Understood. I'll check in on 1st Feb. Wishing you good health meanwhile 🙏
Do you have dance fitness classes? Zumba or Bollywood?
We run Bollywood dance fitness on Mon/Wed at 6 PM and Zumba on Tue/Thu at 6:15 PM.
Sounds fun! How much is it?
Included in the ₹2,499 monthly group-class pass. First session is free!
I'm a competitive runner. Do you have track training or plyo?
We have a plyo zone and a turf. Coach Harsh (ex-national athlete) runs a weekly speed clinic on Sundays.
That's exactly what I need. Let's do annual + his coaching.
Great choice — I'll draft your plan and share by tomorrow 10 AM.
I get back pain from coding. What do you suggest?
I'd recommend core strengthening + mobility work. We have a 'Coder's Back' programme — 8 weeks, twice a week.
What does it cost?
₹9,500 for the 8-week programme, includes PT and a posture assessment.
I'll think about it.
No problem. I'll share a free 10-min desk-mobility video meanwhile. May I WhatsApp it?
Yes please.
I sit 10 hours a day designing. Need posture correction.
Yoga + 1:1 PT twice a week works wonders for this. We have evening slots from 7 PM.
Can I get a combo price?
Yes — Annual Yoga + 24 PT sessions bundled at ₹34,000 (save ₹6,000).
As a nutritionist, I'd love to see your diet plans before joining.
Happy to share samples. Our plans are macro-based and aligned with ICMR guidelines. Shall I email 3 sample plans?
Please, to tara.srinivasan@gmail.com.
Sent. I'll follow up Friday to discuss. Thanks, Tara!
I'm 48 with knee issues. Do you have senior-friendly programmes?
Yes — low-impact strength, aqua fitness and yoga for seniors. We also have a physio on-call.
That sounds good. I'll visit on Sunday.
We're open 6 AM–10 PM Sundays. I'll have Coach Amit meet you at the entrance.
I work in a hotel, shifts are irregular. Do you have 24-hour access?
We're open 5 AM–11 PM. For shift workers, we also offer early 5 AM and late 10 PM PT slots.
Okay, I'll take the quarterly + diet plan.
Excellent. I'll send the payment link and onboarding form now.
I'm a fitness content creator. Do you allow filming inside?
Yes — with prior permission and during non-peak hours. We also offer creator partnerships.
I'd love to collab. Who handles that?
I'll loop in our marketing head. Can I share your Instagram handle?
@yash.lifts — please go ahead!
Hi Rohan, checking in — did you get a chance to think about the monthly plan?
Yeah, but ₹3,500 feels a bit steep.
I can offer a ₹500 welcome discount if you join by Sunday. Still interested?
Okay, let me pay on Sunday evening.
Perfect. I'll hold the discounted slot for you.
Hi Sneha, following up as promised. Ready to discuss the post-pregnancy programme?
Yes! I'm free tomorrow morning.
Great — I've booked you with Coach Meera tomorrow at 9:30 AM. See you!
Hi Neha, sending over the diet consultation plan as promised.
Thanks. Can I get a discount?
If you bundle it with a quarterly membership, I can give you the diet plan at 50% off (₹400).
Deal. Send me the link.
Hi Aditya, hope your trip went well. Want to book a yoga trial?
Yes, this Saturday works.
Booked for Saturday 7:30 AM Hatha. See you!
Hi Siddharth, any decision on the annual + PT plan?
Wife is on board. Let's do it.
🎉 Sending the onboarding link now. Welcome to the family!
Can I try one Zumba class before paying?
Absolutely — free trial this Thursday 6:15 PM. Wear sneakers!
What's the refund policy if I don't like it?
We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee on quarterly and annual plans, no questions asked.
Okay, that's fair. I'll join.
Welcome aboard! I'll send the paperwork.
Do you have parking?
Yes — free 2-wheeler parking and ₹30/hour car parking with membership validation.
Cool, thanks.
Hi Shreya, here's the free desk-mobility video I promised: [link]
Thanks, that's helpful. I'll consider the programme.
Take your time — I'll check in next week.
Can I pay monthly via UPI?
Yes — we accept UPI, cards and net banking. Autopay available too for 5% extra discount.
Are there locker facilities?
Yes — complimentary lockers with your own padlock, or rent ours for ₹200/month.
Good to know.
Hi Manish, checking in as promised. How did your check-up go?
Reports are stable. Let's start the programme next week.
Excellent. I'll book your induction session for Monday 7 AM.
Do you have any corporate tie-ups?
We partner with 12 IT parks in Pune — I can check if your company is on the list. Which company?
Infosys Hinjewadi.
Yes — you get 15% off. Want me to apply it to your plan?
Yes please.
Visited on Sunday. Very clean facility!
Thank you Amit ji! Would you like to start with the senior quarterly plan?
Let me think for a couple of days.
Sure. I'll follow up on Wednesday. Jai Hind 🇮🇳
Hi Yash, our marketing head loved your reel. She'd like to schedule a collab call.
Amazing! I'm free Thursday evening.
Thursday 8:30 PM booked. She'll share a brand-deck beforehand.
